description:
## Scope

After fz-0z4.2 (B) and fz-0z4.3 (C), `ModuleTypes.reachable_specs`
has no consumers. Delete:

- The field declaration at ir_typer.rs:238.
- The construction at ir_typer.rs:826 (`let reachable_specs: ... =
  specs.keys().cloned().collect();`).
- The struct field assignment at ir_typer.rs:833.
- The parity test `module_types_exposes_reachable_specs` at
  ir_typer_tests.rs:1856–1890 (asserts the field mirrors
  `specs.keys()`; obsolete once the field is gone).

Compiler enforces completeness — if any other reader exists, deletion
errors and reveals it.

## Why a separate atom from C

C migrates one consumer; B migrates the other. D is the field
deletion that becomes possible once both are migrated. Keeping the
deletion as its own commit makes the "no more readers" point
explicit in history.

## Depends on

fz-0z4.2 (B) and fz-0z4.3 (C).

## Acceptance

- `cargo build` clean.
- All tests pass.
- `grep -rn reachable_specs src/` shows only the unrelated
  `pub fn ir_typer::reachable_specs(...)` codegen function (line
  2877).
title: Delete ModuleTypes.reachable_specs field, construction, parity test
